archive.title: Archive
archive.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this email?
archive.delete_confirmation_description: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the email and its attachments.

imports.title: Imports
imports.name: Name
imports.create_description: Add a new import to start archiving emails.
imports.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this import?
imports.delete_confirmation_description: This will delete all archived emails, attachments, indexing, and files associated with this import.
imports.bulk_delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected imports?
imports.bulk_delete_confirmation_description: This will delete all archived emails, attachments, indexing, and files associated with these imports.
imports.unmerge_success: Import has been detached from its group.
imports.unmerge_confirmation_description: This will detach the child import from the group and make it a standalone import. Be aware of the following:
imports.unmerge_warning_emails: Emails already imported by this source are stored under the root import. They stay with the root and are not moved.
imports.unmerge_warning_future: Only new emails ingested after unmerging will be stored under this source.
imports.delete_root_warning: This import has {{count}} merged import(s). Deleting it will also delete all merged imports and their data.
imports.imports_description: Import mbox files, Apple Mail mbox folders, .eml files, or a .zip archive of .eml files.

system_settings.title: System Settings
system_settings.saved_message: Your changes have been saved successfully.

updates.title: Software updates
updates.description: Check whether a newer version of PEA is available to install.
updates.auto_check_description: Check for a new version each time PEA starts, and ask before installing anything. Turn this off to only check when you press the button below.
updates.install_started: Downloading update… PEA will restart when it's ready.
updates.desktop_only: Updates are only available in the desktop app.

email_preview.not_available: Raw .eml file not available for this email.

import_source_form.import_path_help: Pick a .mbox or .eml file, a .zip of .eml files, or a folder. Folders are scanned recursively — Apple Mail .mbox folders, plain mbox exports, and loose .eml files are all detected automatically.
import_source_form.picker_unavailable: The file picker is unavailable — type the path manually.
import_source_form.merge_into_tooltip: When merging, this new import becomes a child of the selected root import. All emails from this import are stored under the root import — not this one.

dashboard_page.title: Dashboard
dashboard_page.no_import_header: You don't have any imports set up.
dashboard_page.no_import_text: Add an import to start archiving your emails.
